title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
summary: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
whyItMatters: Agentic video understanding equips models with long-term memory to autonomously process and respond to continuous, long-horizon multimodal streams. However, advanced video agents often rely on ``detective-style'' iterative reasoning for action control (e.g., $\mathtt{search}$) and evidence aggregation, incurring prohibitive costs and latency. We argue that…
